# Millennia Credit Card
Best CashBack Credit Card
  * 5% Cashback on Amazon, Flipkart, Myntra, Swiggy, Zomato and more
  * ₹1000 worth gift voucher on spends of ₹1 Lakh per calendar quarter
  * 1% CashBack on other spend


[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?LGCode=MKTG&utm_content=MKTG "Apply Now")
![Millennia Credit Card](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/Millennia1?fmt=webp-alpha)

### More benefits then ever before
Online Shopping Benefits
  * 5% CashBack on leading brands - Amazon, Flipkart, Myntra, Tata CLiQ, Swiggy, Zomato, Uber, BookMyShow, Sony LIV and Cult.fit


Milestone Benefits
  * Get either ₹1,000 worth gift voucher or 1 domestic lounge access on spends of ₹1,00,000 and above in each calendar quarter
  * Already Qualified for Milestone voucher: [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.gyftr.com/myrewards/hdfcbankmillennia/login) to redeem.
  * For Steps to redeem the Milestone voucher, [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/millennia-credit-card/pdf/quarterly-spends-milestone-program.pdf)


Reward Benefits
  * 1% CashBack on other Spends
  * Note : For Detailed Terms and Conditions, [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/millennia-credit-card/Terms-and-Conditions-Millennia-Credit-Card.pdf)


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/millennia-credit-card#a "View More")
![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
![ads-block-img](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Additional Benefits
### CashBack Benefits
  * 1% CashBack on other spends
  * Upto 10% CashBack across 200+ Brands via SmartBuy/PayZapp Shop
  * Pay your Membership fee and get Reward Points equivalent to Fee Amount
  * Note : For Detailed Terms and Conditions, [Click Here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/millennia-credit-card/pdf/millennia-tnc-25th%20apr%2725.pdf)


View More 
![Millennia Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Milestone and Lounge Benefits
  * Get either ₹1,000 worth gift voucher or 1 domestic lounge access on spends of ₹1,00,000 and above in each calendar quarter
  * Quarterly spend-based Domestic Airport Lounge Access
  * Please Note: Lounge access is integrated into quarterly spends milestone program. Upon achieving quarterly spends milestone, users can either opt for HOI airport lounge access voucher (Or) Rs. 1000 voucher from the available list of Brands
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/millennia-credit-card/pdf/lounge-voucher-on-millennia-credit-card.pdf) for details
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://lms.hoi.in/lounge-list/MIL) for List of Participating Airport Lounges


View More 
![Millennia Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Dining and Travel Benefits
  * 10% additional discount on Swiggy Dineout using coupon code HDFCCARDS, [TnC(opens in a new tab)](https://webviews.swiggy.com/portal-static-page/dineout-hdfc-tnc/)
  * 1% fuel surcharge waiver at all fuel stations across India (on minimum transaction of ₹400 & maximum transaction of ₹5,000. Maximum waiver of ₹250 per statement cycle)


View More 
![Millennia Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### PayZapp / SmartBuy Benefits
  * Get upto 10% Additional CashBack via PayZapp Shop / SmartBuy
  * Visit Shop Section on your PayZapp App or Login on SmartBuy, [SmartBuy | Home(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.reward360.in/v2/foryou)


![Millennia Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Banking Benefits
  * **Card Management:** Made simple via HDFC Bank [MyCards(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfc.bank.in/)
  * **Interest Free Credit Period:** Up to 50 days of interest free period from the date of purchase (subject to the submission of the charge by the Merchant)
  * **Zero lost card liability:** In the unfortunate event of losing your HDFC Bank Millennia Credit Card, on reporting it immediately to our 24-hour call centre (Toll free numbers **1800 1600/1800 2600**. Customers traveling overseas can reach us at **022-61606160**.
  * **Contactless Payment:** Facilitating fast, convenient and secure payments at retail outlets
  * **Smart EMI:** an option to convert your big spends into EMI after purchase. To know more click here


View More 
![Millennia Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Wondering if you are eligible?
Salaried
  * **Nationality:** Indian
  * **Age:** Minimum 21 years & Maximum 40 years
  * **Income:** Net Monthly Income > ₹35,000


Self Employed
  * Nationality:Indian
  * Age: Minimum 21 years & Maximum 40 years
  * Income: ITR > ₹6 Lakh per annum


![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
##  Save up to ₹20,000* annually Just like 20 lakh+ HDFC Bank Millennia Credit Cardholders 
[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?icid=website_organic_nudgebanner_saveupto20000annuallyjustlike10lakhhdfcbankcardholders:link:applynow#nbb "Apply Now ")
![Millennia Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Documents required to get you started
Identity Proof
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID
  * Driving licence
  * PAN card
  * Passport size photographs


Address Proof
  * Utility bills (electricity, water, gas, or telephone)
  * Rental agreement
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID


Income Proof
  * Salary slips (for salaried individuals)
  * Income Tax Returns (ITR)
  * Form 16
  * Bank statements


## Apply Now in 3 Easy Steps:
**Online application process:**
  * Step 1 - Provide & validate your Phone Number & Date of Birth/PAN
  * Step 2- Confirm your details
  * Step 3- Select your Card
  * Step 4- Submit & Receive your Card*


*In certain cases, uploading documents and completing video KYC might be required.
[Check Eligibility (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?LGCode=MKTG&utm_content=MKTG "Check Eligibility")
![no data](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Know more about the card
  1. ### Card Control via MyCards
  2. ### Fees & Charges
  3. ### Redemption Value
  4. ### Credit and Safety
  5. ### Contactless payments
  6. ### Application Channels
  7. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions


###  Card Control via MyCards 
[MyCards(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfcbank.com/), a mobile-based service platform for all Credit Card needs, facilitates convenient activation and management of HDFC Bank Millennia Credit Card on the go. It ensures a seamless experience without the need for passwords or downloads.
  * Credit Card Registration and Activation
  * Set up Card PIN 
  * Manage card controls like online spends, contactless transactions
  * View Transactions/Download e-statements
  * Check Reward Points
  * Block/Re-issue card
  * Apply for an Add-on Card, manage, set PIN and card controls for Add-on card
  * Single Interface  
One unified platform for Credit Cards, Debit Cards, FASTag and Consumer Durable Loans. 
  * Spends tracking  
Simple interface to track all your spends. 
  * Reward Points  
View and redeem points at the push of a button.


![Card Management and Controls](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Fees and Charges 
  * Joining/Renewal Membership Fee – ₹1,000/- + Applicable Taxes
  * Spend over ₹1,00,000 in a year before renewal to get your Credit Card fee waived.
  * [Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/millennia-credit-card/fees-and-charges) to view details of HDFC Bank Millennia Credit Card Fees and Charges.
  * Detailed Terms and Conditions, [Click Here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/personal-mitc/mitc-in-english.pdf)


![Fees and Charges](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Redemption Value 
  * CashBack is in Reward Points and is redeemable against the statement balance upon request.
  * 1 Rewards points is equivalent:
1. CashBack (as against statement balance) = ₹1
2. On SmartBuy - Flight and Hotel bookings = ₹0.30
3. Airmiles = ₹0.30
4. Rewards catalogue = upto 0.30
  * A minimum of 500 Reward Points are required for statement balance redemption.
  * Reward Points redemption for CashBack redemption are capped per calendar month to 3,000 Rewards Points.
  * Flight and hotel bookings are capped at 50% with Reward Points; the rest of transaction amount will have to be paid via credit limit.
  * Reward points redemption for flights & hotels bookings are capped per calendar month at 50,000.
  * Cardmembers can redeem upto 70% of product/Voucher value through Reward points on select vouchers/products and pay the remaining amount via Credit card.
  * Unredeemed Reward Points expire/lapse after 2 years.
  * [Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/services/claim-rewards) for more details.


![Card Control and Redemption](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Credit and Safety 
  * Up to 50 days of interest free period on your HDFC Bank Millennia Credit Card from the date of purchase (subject to the submission of the charge by the Merchant)
  * **Zero lost card liability** : In the unfortunate event of losing your HDFC Bank Millennia Credit Card, on reporting it immediately to our 24-hour call centre (Toll free numbers **1800 1600/1800 2600**. Customers traveling overseas can reach us at **022-61606160** , you have zero liability on any fraudulent transactions made on your Credit Card.


![Credit and Safety](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Contactless payments 
  * This Card is enabled* for contactless payments at retail outlets.


*Note:
  * In India, contactless payments up to ₹5,000 per transaction don’t require a PIN entry.
  * For amounts ₹5,000 or more, the cardholder must enter their Credit Card PIN for security.
  * You may check for the Contactless Network Symbol on your card.


![Contactless payments](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Application Channels 
You can choose any of the following easy options to apply for your HDFC Bank Credit Card:
  * **1. Website  
**You can quickly apply online by clicking [here(opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?LGCode=MKTG&utm_content=MKTG).
  * **2. NetBanking  
**If you're an existing HDFC Bank customer, simply[ log in(opens in a new tab)](https://netbanking.hdfcbank.com/netbanking/ "https://netbanking.hdfcbank.com/netbanking/") to NetBanking and apply from the ‘Cards’ section.
  * **3. HDFC Bank Branch  
**Prefer a face-to-face interaction? Just visit your nearest [branch(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/branch-locator) and our staff will help you with the application.


![Application Channels](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * From 1st September 2024, wallet loading, Easy EMI, and education payments won't earn Reward Points.
    * For detailed Terms & Conditions, [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/millennia-credit-card/pdf/millennia-tnc-25th%20apr%2725.pdf).
    * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/cards/services) to access all important links related to your Credit Card.


![Most Important Terms and Conditions](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
###  What is the Millennia Credit Card?
The Millennia Credit Card is an HDFC Bank credit card that offers a range of benefits and rewards on your everyday spending. It provides CashBack on online and offline purchases, lounge access privileges, fuel surcharge waivers, and much more. Apply for the Millennia Credit Card to enjoy a world of exclusive benefits and **_rewards._**
###  What is the minimum credit score required for the Millennia Credit Card?
The minimum credit score required for the Millennia Credit Card is subject to HDFC Bank's internal policies. We recommend you check your eligibility to determine if you meet the requirements.
###  Is the Millennia Credit Card free?
The Millennia Credit Card comes with an annual membership fee of ₹1000 plus applicable taxes. However, you can get the renewal fee waived by spending ₹1,00,000 and above within the first year.  

### Millennia Credit Card
  * Get 5% Cashback
  * Lounge Access
  * Fuel Waiver
  * Smart EMI


[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html#nbb "Apply Now")
